name: Chocolate Mint Sticks
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
1. Grease a 9 inch square baking pan.
2. Beat the eggs until combined.
3. Add melted butter and sugar, mixing well.
4. Incorporate melted chocolate and peppermint extract into the mixture.
5. Mix in flour and ground almonds until smooth.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from oven and let cool on a trivet or rack.
7. Prepare peppermint filling by thoroughly blending butter and cream in a small bowl. Add powdered sugar and peppermint extract, mixing well.
8. Spread the cooled filling evenly over the baked layer.
9. Melt chocolate and butter together in a small pan until smooth for frosting.
10. Once the filling is firm, spread the frosting mixture on top of the cake.
11. Refrigerate until the chocolate has set firmly. Cut into 3/4 by 2 1/4 inch strips.
